General.Name: Prairie Operating Co. Common Stock
General.Description: Prairie Operating Co., an independent energy company, engages in the acquisition, development, and production of crude oil, natural gas, and natural gas liquids resources in the United States. Prairie Operating Co. is based in Houston, Texas.
